---
title: "Nicholas Cranmer"
subtitle: "EEB PhD Student"
image: /images/portraits/nicholas-cranmer.jpg
role: phd
weight: 6
aliases: ["Nicholas Cranmer", "N. Cranmer", "N Cranmer", "Nick Cranmer"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:nc459@cornell.edu"
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: "https://twitter.com/NicholasCranme1"
---

I am primarily interested in using remote sensing technologies such as terrestrial
laser scanning (i.e., terrestrial LiDAR) to further understand ecological processes
such as carbon sequestration and storage under different forest management
practices.
